channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipped black bags of used clothes, 27th April
item.description:
This bag has now been here for a week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danecroft Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1 ton unsecured weight hanging from scaffolding on the road, 27th April
item.description:
1 ton unsecured weight hanging loosely from a rope pulley overnight from scaffolding on 1 Doyce Street. Swaying dangerously in the wind and can drop and cause injuries

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Doyce Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of dog mess outside the main entrance gate to Albert Barnes House, 27th April
item.description:
Pile of dog mess outside the main entrance gate to Albert Barnes House. We have had repeated probelms with this, in the Albert Barnes front garden also and on the footpath outside. Residents suspect it's new tenants who have a large dog as this is a recent problem. This was noticed today
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Kent Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal dangerous parking, 27th April
item.description:
This vehicle has started parking illegally and dangerously on double yellow lines significantly reducing vision out of Bastion Road into Wickham Lane, SE2.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bastion Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Graffiti needs removing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Eden Park Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Graffiti / Flyposting on stop or shelter (non-offensive)

item.title: Harvington Park Bins Overflowing Not Emptied Since Last Thursday., 27th April
item.description:
The bins are overflowing and litter is blowing over the park from the bins.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): South Eden Park Road, Eden Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parked delivery tricycles in bike lane, 27th April
item.description:
The druid street bike lane is being blocked by tricycles / cargo bikes from a local business , 86 druid street . The arnold estate local residents association chairman has complained to the business but no action has been taken. The photos clearly show one lane completely taken over by the parked bikes and another then being forced to cycle on the wrong side, thus completely blocking the lane for bikes. This happens all the time during businesses hours.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86, Druid Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Kingswood ave near junction with Hopefield, 27th April
item.description:
Significant pothole sufficient that would dislodge cyclist and cannot be seen at night

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingswood Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
